欢迎来到享乐层=）"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1692061125,"group_id":"7254842836938394683","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"吾终日三醒吾身：醒一醒、醒一醒、醒一醒 ​​​","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N5R4mc1E5Qt+KMShR5i+doyk6wWh2TqwbjwHuXq/jiyy","gender":2,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/1967296cea594d02ae42fe87b000f9a1~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776794704&x-signature=p1CL3OhxxK2AmU5IYKfLj8ceI04%3D","user_id":"3232192429564859","user_name":"阴天烤鱼"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"3232192429564859","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[{"en_title":"author","intro":"{"title_name":"作家","title_id":"author"}","is_author_title":true,"is_vip_title":false,"label":"{"title_text":"作家","title_default_color":"#FFFFFF","title_dark_color":"#FFFFFF","bg_default_color":"{\"start\":\"#FF9F31\",\"end\":\"#FFB95C\"}","bg_dark_color":"{\"start\":\"#CC8029\",\"end\":\"#CC9349\"}","title_dark_diaphaneity":"CC"}","zh_title":"作家"}]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7254842836938394683","book_info":{"abstract":"【后室】+【智商在线】+【探索】+【创新层级】+【剧情】+【不无敌】
空荡的房间散发着昏黄的灯光，潮湿的旧地毯带着刺鼻的臭味，入目之处是一成不变、令人抓狂的单调黄色…
如果你不幸在错误的地方脱离了现实，那么最终你会来到这样一个地方——后室。
在这里，如果你听到有东西在附近徘徊，愿上帝保佑你，因为它肯定听到了你的声音。
这是2019年七月，国外某论坛对于一张图片的描述。
此贴一出，越来越多人声称自己梦到过这个怪异空间，更诡异的是，有人甚至在现实发现多处与后室重叠的地方。
日本奈良圆形厂房，加利福尼亚森林深处，佛罗里达海边，几乎都与后室一致……
后室，真的存在吗？
而那天，我却意外闯入后室。","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/385bfb3a99878e8dbbcb7f6196af3e57","author":"深井之水","author_id":"","book_id":"7254842836938394683","book_name":"Backroons后室逃脱","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#383008","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"2.8万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":539,"name":"悬疑脑洞","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=539&name=悬疑脑洞&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":37,"name":"穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37&name=穿越&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":10,"name":"悬疑","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=10&name=悬疑&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":100,"name":"灵异","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=100&name=灵异&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7254842884128670269","read_count":"27632","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"484057"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"9.5","serial_count":"223","tags":"悬疑脑洞,穿越,灵异,悬疑","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/p2o0b62e78256e97a413fba8aa306a32f3f~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779394194&x-signature=K3enJz5KW04C80FptU6%2B1PrY3Kg%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"2163437626997837","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"1.1386148e+07"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260323040954AB6A6676E13F1BFC74B5"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读3小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":15,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":0,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":11386,"reply_count":4,"show_pv":13298},"user_action":{"author":0,"author_digg_time":1692062549,"author_reply_time":1692062566,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"comment_id":"7463656105028977432","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"后室唯一真神，这本书是我看的所有后室小说中没有弃书的，现在已经是4刷了。
超级超级超级超级好看啊。
这本书纯后室，没系统（我真的不太喜欢有系统的后室文……）特别符合我的口味。
类型就属于有脑子又有点微爽的文
书里有很多自创，很好的，希望作者可以把自创层级投去官网！
作者不过有点短了，不够看啊，希望作者大大多出点番外！
我真的真的很喜欢这本书，推荐来看～"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1737776628,"group_id":"7254842836938394683","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N9FIU+EF+NDoVijHVvxdAFIgA3KCzCdu4DxdtuzuNDKh","gender":2,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/b393f975c73c48a0b4f6dd5c45509758~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776794941&x-signature=eXLizVdRh5IpdPTAqwFAm4XmOvc%3D","user_id":"1983988859672286","user_name":"OMG原来是男妈妈"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"1983988859672286","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[{"en_title":"author","intro":"{"title_name":"作家","title_id":"author"}","is_author_title":true,"is_vip_title":false,"label":"{"title_text":"作家","title_default_color":"#FFFFFF","title_dark_color":"#FFFFFF","bg_default_color":"{\"start\":\"#FF9F31\",\"end\":\"#FFB95C\"}","bg_dark_color":"{\"start\":\"#CC8029\",\"end\":\"#CC9349\"}","title_dark_diaphaneity":"CC"}","zh_title":"作家"}]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7254842836938394683","book_info":{"abstract":"【后室】+【智商在线】+【探索】+【创新层级】+【剧情】+【不无敌】

而那天，我却意外闯入后室。","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/385bfb3a99878e8dbbcb7f6196af3e57","author":"深井之水","author_id":"","book_id":"7254842836938394683","book_name":"Backroons后室逃脱","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#383008","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"2.8万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":539,"name":"悬疑脑洞","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=539&name=悬疑脑洞&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":37,"name":"穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37&name=穿越&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":10,"name":"悬疑","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=10&name=悬疑&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":100,"name":"灵异","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=100&name=灵异&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7254842884128670269","read_count":"27632","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"484057"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"9.5","serial_count":"223","tags":"悬疑脑洞,穿越,灵异,悬疑","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/p2o0b62e78256e97a413fba8aa306a32f3f~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779394194&x-signature=K3enJz5KW04C80FptU6%2B1PrY3Kg%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"2163437626997837","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"55"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260323040954AB6A6676E13F1BFC74B5"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读17小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":25,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":0,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":59446,"reply_count":4,"show_pv":5487},"user_action":{"author":0,"author_digg_time":1737787460,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"comment_id":"7395912328717648702","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"本书不出意外的意外，5⭐️
剧情构思之类的都好新颖，很符合胃口，并且也没有感情戏，看的好爽
刚开始其实我都不知道他们有写大纲，感觉写的很好，后来他有一个那个章节说他没有写大纲，是随便写的，我没怎么感觉，硬说的话，就是前期，可能有点不太舒服，但是不太影响观感
其中很多人物都描写的有血有肉，感觉很饱满，很立体，很好看
我不是很了解后室
但是我对后室很感兴趣，所以看了这本书
我觉得前期比较梦核，怪诞，像后期他那个神战有点那种爽文的感觉了
感谢作者大大写出这么不错的书，真的好看"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1721998874,"group_id":"7254842836938394683","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"宛若游龙","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N2h2zdhPHv03K0J4MzzCEpQ=","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":2,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/8426fc4f57dd48679a56a09f47b5d687~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776793868&x-signature=OaKtscg%2BfDP9aMGZ2usGe8PZRVw%3D","user_id":"567762943740743","user_name":"柏舟ouo"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"567762943740743","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"sticker":{"expire_time":1743839680,"is_worn":true,"sticker":{"add_context":"","bg_color":"#FFF3DD","can_worn":false,"id":2,"name":"永不书荒","small_url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/2c704b96a929a7a8b3461ddbf49a8d01","sticker_type":1,"url":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/b93ef223f8131d9ee8e8312f642d9681"}},"user_title_info":[{"en_title":"author","intro":"{"title_name":"作家","title_id":"author"}","is_author_title":true,"is_vip_title":false,"label":"{"title_text":"作家","title_default_color":"#FFFFFF","title_dark_color":"#FFFFFF","bg_default_color":"{\"start\":\"#FF9F31\",\"end\":\"#FFB95C\"}","bg_dark_color":"{\"start\":\"#CC8029\",\"end\":\"#CC9349\"}","title_dark_diaphaneity":"CC"}","zh_title":"作家"}]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7254842836938394683","book_info":{"abstract":"【后室】+【智商在线】+【探索】+【创新层级】+【剧情】+【不无敌】
